In Brief

Posted:

11:01 AM PDT · October 8, 2025

![Chief Technology Officer of X Elon Musk speaks onstage during the "Exploring the New Frontiers of Innovation: Mark Read in Conversation with Elon Musk"](https://techcrunch.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/GettyImages-2158237938_c19018.jpg?w=1024)**Image Credits:** Richard Bord/WireImage / Getty Images

- ![Amanda Silberling](https://techcrunch.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Amanda-Silberling.jpg?w=668)

- [Amanda Silberling](https://techcrunch.com/author/amanda-silberling/)

# Elon Musk will settle $128M lawsuit with former Twitter execs

Elon Musk will settle [a $128 million lawsuit](https://techcrunch.com/2024/03/04/former-twitter-ceo-sues-elon-musk/) with four Twitter executives he fired after taking over the company in 2022.

One of Musk’s [first moves](https://techcrunch.com/2022/10/27/elon-musk-fired-top-twitter-execs-including-ceo-reports-say/) upon buying Twitter was to fire CEO Parag Agrawal, CFO Ned Segal, and top lawyers Sean Edgett and Vijaya Gadde. The four executives never received severance payments, which they claim is because they tried to hold Musk to his $44 billion commitment when he tried to [back out](https://techcrunch.com/2022/07/08/twitter-is-really-not-having-elon-musks-attempt-to-back-out-of-buying-it/) of buying the company. The lawsuit even quotes Walter Isaacson’s biography of Musk, which quotes him as saying that he would “hunt every single one” of Twitter’s C-suite “till the day they die.”

While a court filing confirms that the parties have reached a settlement, it’s not yet clear what the terms of that settlement are.

It’s not just these executives who have sued Musk for severance payments. Musk recently [settled a class action lawsuit](https://techcrunch.com/2025/08/21/elon-musks-x-may-finally-settle-500m-severance-lawsuit/) concerning 6,000 laid-off Twitter employees. Many of these former Twitter staff complained that they received incomplete severance payments or did not receive severance payments at all.

Topics

[Elon Musk](https://techcrunch.com/tag/elon-musk/), [Social](https://techcrunch.com/category/social/), [Twitter](https://techcrunch.com/tag/twitter/), [X](https://techcrunch.com/tag/x/)
